Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The GetDataBufferLimits method returns a structure containing information on the limits this graphics device has around data buffers, in the form of the GetDataBufferLimits structure. These limits are fixed for the graphics device, and must not be exceeded by the application.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: A structure containing information on the limits this graphics device has around data buffers
